ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug ingredient */,
  "brand_example" TEXT /* Example brand of the drug */,
  "exempt_status" TEXT /* Exempt or non-exempt status of the drug */,
  "special_fill" TEXT /* Special filling requirements for the drug */,
  "peri_op" TEXT /* Perioperative information regarding the drug */,
  "drug_class" TEXT /* Class of the drug (e.g., Anticonvulsants, Analgesics) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the drug manufacturer */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Indicates whether the ingredient is active or discontinued */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the drug was approved for use */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline reference */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug ingredient to which the guideline applies */,
  "guideline_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the guideline within ACOEM */,
  "guideline_version" TEXT /* Version of the guideline */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the guideline was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guidelines_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES drug_ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dosage_forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dosage form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the dosage form (e.g., tablet, liquid) */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of dosage form (e.g., oral, injectable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dosage form */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strengths" (
  "strength_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strength detail */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug ingredient for which strength is defined */,
  "strength_value" TEXT /* Value for the strength of the drug */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the strength (e.g., mg, mL) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strength_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strengths_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES drug_ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_identifiers" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmaceutical identifier */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug ingredient for which the identifier is applicable */,
  "identifier_value" TEXT /* Value of the unique pharmaceutical identifier */,
  "identifier_type" TEXT /* Type of identifier (e.g., NDC, DIN) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_identifiers_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES drug_ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Pharmacist, Administrator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role responsibilities */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the user account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance log entry */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug ingredient being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the log entry */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "reason_for_status" TEXT /* Reason for the compliance status */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the log entry was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_logs_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES drug_ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periop_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perioperative detail */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drug ingredient related to the detail */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for perioperative usage of the drug */,
  "periop_phase" TEXT /* Phase of perioperative care (e.g., preoperative, intraoperative, postoperative) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_periop_details_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES drug_ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drug_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug class (e.g., Analgesics - Opioid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the class encompasses */,
  "class_code" TEXT /* Code for the drug class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
